name: TaskClaw Default Boards
description: Default seed boards for new TaskClaw accounts. Includes the X Content Pipeline and Personal Board with agents, skills, and board configurations.
author: system@taskclaw.co

_readme.manifest_version: 1.1 adds agents[] array and default_agent_slug on steps. categories[] and linked_category_slug are kept for backward compatibility during the F14 soak period.
_readme.how_slugs_work: Every entity uses a deterministic slug for cross-referencing. When imported, the system creates UUIDs but maintains slug-based lookups so agents, skills, and board steps stay connected.
_readme.import_order: 1) Agents (+ categories for legacy) → 2) Skills → 3) agent_skills junction (+ category_skills for legacy) → 4) Board template → 5) Board instance + steps with default_agent_id resolved from default_agent_slug

entity_relationships.agent.slug: Unique per account. Used to resolve default_agent_id on board steps.
entity_relationships.agent.persona: System prompt for the agent. Compiled with skills/knowledge into SKILL.md on sync.
entity_relationships.agent.skills[].slug: Skills embedded in the agent. Created and linked via agent_skills junction.
entity_relationships.agent.knowledge_docs[]: Knowledge docs embedded in the agent. Created with agent_id FK.
entity_relationships.step.default_agent_slug: References an agent by slug. Resolved to default_agent_id on import (F02+).
entity_relationships.step.linked_category_slug: LEGACY — references a category by slug. Resolved to linked_category_id. Kept until F14 deprecation.
entity_relationships.category.skills[].slug: LEGACY — skills linked via category_skills junction. Migrated to agent_skills on import.
entity_relationships.category.knowledge_docs[]: LEGACY — knowledge docs with category_id FK. Migrated to agent_id on import.

slug_conventions.boards: kebab-case, globally unique per account (e.g., x-content-pipeline)
slug_conventions.agents: kebab-case, unique per account (e.g., x-copywriter, personal-secretary)
slug_conventions.categories: LEGACY — same slugs as agents during dual-write period
slug_conventions.skills: kebab-case, unique per account (e.g., x-post-writer, personal-task-planner)
slug_conventions.steps: kebab-case, unique per board (e.g., idea, drafting, inbox, planning)

_readme.extending: To add a new seed board: create a new JSON file using manifest_version 1.1 schema with agents[] (primary). categories[] is optional during the F14 soak period. Add the $ref to the boards array here.
